name: trip-weaver
description: TripWeaver — collaborative travel-planning platform (MERN scenario for DevSim)

scripts.install:all: pnpm install && cd client && pnpm install && cd ../server && pnpm install
scripts.test:tasks:l1: pnpm run test:task:client:l1:t1 && pnpm run test:task:client:l1:t2
scripts.test:tasks:l2: pnpm run test:task:client:l2:t1 && pnpm run test:task:client:l2:t2
scripts.test:tasks:l3: pnpm run test:task:server:l3:t1 && pnpm run test:task:server:l3:t2
scripts.test:tasks:l4: pnpm run test:task:server:l4:t1 && pnpm run test:task:server:l4:t2 && pnpm run test:task:client:l4:t1
scripts.test:tasks:l5: pnpm run test:task:server:l5:t1 && pnpm run test:task:server:l5:t2
